item.title: Azure Storage – Outage in East US
item.description: We are aware of an outage affecting Azure Blob Storage in the East US region. Customers may experience errors connecting to storage accounts. Our engineering team is investigating the issue and will provide updates every 30 minutes.

item.title: Azure App Service – Elevated Latency in West Europe
item.description: Customers may be experiencing elevated latency when accessing Azure App Service resources in West Europe. We are investigating the root cause and working to restore normal performance.
